entry.title: Re: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA -...
entry.content: Hello, the robot always needs to know which page it is working with. If the entire automation is within one try-catch block, it is possible to split it into multiple blocks and handle any errors for each, or by using Exists(Screen) to determine which page is open.

entry.title: Questions Regarding SAP Companion for Desktop
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been trying to explore the SAP Companion for Desktop feature within SAP Enable Now. I have some questions around it.

  1. How can I roll out SAP Companion for Desktop to End users? How can they access SAP Companion for Desktop from their machines without having to install SAP Enable Now? 
     
  2. What to do if an end user is not able to view a guided tour on a bigger monitor properly? The highlights and the hotspots appear misplaced when the guided tour is run on a bigger monitor. Is there a way to fix that? How can I record a guided tour whose resolution remains unaffected by the size of the screen it is run on? Is it possible to do that?
     
  3. How can I neutralise the data on a recorded guided tour to make the end user experience seamless? What pointers do I need to keep in mind? There are quite a few transactions that involve entering alphanumeric fields (Material number/PO, etc.). An end user cannot be expected to enter the exact same characters as entered in a recorded guided tour. What can I do to make learning for an end user hassle free? Can you please suggest ways around it?

  4. Also, would the guided tour be sensitive to the the SAP logon theme it is recorded on? I tested the guided tour I recorded using an old SAP logon theme with a user that had the Quartz theme of SAP logon selected. Some of the screen icons/elements were identifiable and some weren't. What do you suggest is a best practice here?

I understand these questions are lengthy. And I am asking a lot here. Request you to please provide a resolution as and when you can.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Create DB table based on CDS's structure.
entry.content: @Raymond Hello, When sending a name of table to 'tabl_name' parameter in DD_TABL_GET function (line 14) and after calling 'DD_TABL_PUT' function ,then it creates a new table as excepted. But when sending a name of CDS to 'tabl_name' parameter (line 15), it creates a view. What should I change in the parameters , which are sent to 'DD_TABL_PUT',in order to receive a table (not a view)? I tried to add ls_dd02v-tabclass = 'TRANSP'. (line 44) , but it did not help.

entry.title: Re: Archiving Object - Entry missing in Customizing table...
entry.content:
Hi,

For those who come after this, "Customizing Settings" need to be created for the archiving object in AOBJ. The error message is not appearing after I did so.

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: Re: WebUI in ChaRM - How to change field label?
entry.content:
Hi Sergey,

You can change the field label in the CRM UI itself. 

 

  1. Launch CRM Web UI [T-code SM_CRM/CRM_UI]
  2. Choose a relevant business role [Ex : SOLMANPRO]
  3. Open the document you want to change the field label for and click on the "Show configurable areas" button at the top right. If you're unable to see this button kindly check the KBA 2520279 - SAP CRM WebUI: Show Configurable areas/Configure page buttons are not showing up, to enable this button. 
  4. Once you click on the "Show configurable areas" button, click on the section where the field is added on the screen.
  5. The View configuration page opens up and a configuration layer is selected by default. 
  6. You can select the field you want to change the label for and click on the "Show Field properties" button. 
  7. You can directly edit the Field label here. 
  8. Save and apply the changes made. 

    Hope this helps. If this doesn't help change the field label and if you still have issues with editing the label, feel free to raise a case with CA-WUI-UI component area and we'll help check this further. 

    Best Regards, 
    Deepa
    SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Linking Stages on Marketing Documents
entry.content: Thank you for you prompt reply.

entry.title: ARTICLE ON AI ENGINEERING
entry.content:
AI Engineering has become an integral part of our life in both Professionally and Personally. Not only it is helping us in our day to day life but also it is the future of Technology as we all know about it.  I have learnt about AI engineering, the impact and importance of AI in our day to day lives and scope of future prospects. I have learnt about many topics like prompt engineering, fine tuning, lang chain algorithm, probabilistic and deterministic approach. I have got to know about different AI tools and their uses, ChatGPT3 and ChatGPT4 being among the popular used AI tools. I have learnt about the practical uses of the AI analysis and deterministic approach of AI.

Prompt engineering taught me how to provide the prompts to the AI and it will process and analyse the prompts and give us a definite solution. If I need to check like what is sap, I can easily get the definition and details of sap. If I need to find out what are the modules present in the sap, I can get the details like SAP ABAP, SAP MM, SAP FICO, etc.

Fine tuning taught me how to improve the performance of AI like faster computation, accurate results, and precise solutions. Basically, AI has become an integral part of our life which has definitely made our life and work both easier and approachable. Earlier, to get any information we had to think about how to follow the approach for the solution and result. But now with the extent of the AI tools, it has become very easy.

The lang chain is a major theoretical concept of AI. Lang chain is a type of framework which is basically an Open-source software which can develop applications based on large language models. By this we mean to say that it is generative type of concept. If I want to do any code analysis like analysing large codes having complex logic, at that time I can use the lang chain. Like if we are having a program of 5000 – 6000 lines, we can easily use the concept of lang chain model to find the solution like where is the error and how to resolve the error in the code logic.

Feature store is an important concept in AI engineering. It is mainly used to store the past data like the prompts and inputs which we provide to the ai interface. For example, if I have previously searched for vehicles, then this time before giving any prompt, it will display about the vehicles like cars and bikes to search for. Again, if I am selecting Cars, then I will get the names of the Brands like Mercedes Benz, Audi, BMW, etc. If I am selecting bikes, then it will show the options like Honda, Bajaj, Suzuki, etc. Basically, it will analyse the past data and generate new data based on history input given.

Model monitoring is a major topic in AI engineering. It mainly deals with deterministic approach and probabilistic approach. Deterministic approach mainly deals with the events which are destined to happen. In other words, we can say like these are certain to happen. For example, Sunday comes after Saturday. This is a deterministic event.

We cannot have Friday after Saturday. Likewise, whenever we are calculating or measuring the length and breadth of an object, it is already certain that its length is 10 cm or other. But this is not the same case with respect to the probabilistic approach. If I want to calculate distance between Bangalore and Chennai, it can be different for everyone depending on their perception.

One of the challenges I feel is that AI can lead to disruption of thinking power of people because people will not consider it necessary to think and analyse the code or concept, but they will instead login to ChatGPT and search for their required answers. In almost all the cases, people are indeed getting the generated answers which include the exact program logic which is required for a Developer to build an App. This in turn is hampering the thinking capability of an individual for problem solving and Root cause Analysis. Since, people are getting everything on ChatGPT, they are developing carefree attitude. This is surely going to affect the future generations in some way.

Another challenge is loss in future jobs as per the reports which we read daily in News and Blogs. The monotonous jobs in many sectors including IT industry which can be done by AI are being replaced by AI. This is certainly one of the reasons for many layoffs happening in the IT Industry due to Cost cutting and other factors.

There are Pros of using AI Engineering as well. AI can be used along with our work for our support as well which can certainly help us in some or the other way. We have also read in the news that AI can be used to upskill the present employees with Hands on Experience so that they can work on AI in present as well as Future. Hence, this is certainly going to create lakhs of new job opportunities for the future generation.

Basically, AI has become a part of our life and we must adapt it so that we are able to cope up with Working needs of the Future.

entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud - How to fix X-axis position in c...
entry.content:
@AndreaTerrone 

I think No, the X axis position shifts based on +ve or -ve bars.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: What to do when you forget to click 'Without Qty Post...
entry.content:
Hi,

Right click on the Credit Note, and choose Cancel from the menu. This will cancel the Credit Note. Then create a new Credit Note, this time with 'Without Qty Posting'.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

According to Transition to SAP Cloud ALM - SAP Solution Manager is in mainstream maintenance until the end of DIGITS. SAP Cloud ALM is the Go-to ALM platform for all SAP customers. SAP recommends to complete the transition to SAP Cloud ALM before this date 

We are using the chaRM in Solution Manager and would like to understand if CALM and support (or when) the same functionality as chaRM before we migrate the change management to CALM.

Can you provide us the link of comparison between chaRM and CALM? It would help customer to make the decision and plan ahead for migration before solution manager end of main stream date. 

We already checked the roadmap but could not find end-to-end process.

Thank you.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

I would recommend you to use the tool: SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM

This tool will analyze the scenario used in your SAP Solution Manager customers and tell you which of your used scenarios in SolMan are available/supported or planned or not in the CALM, and giving the transition project hints.

See this Blog post on SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM 

Access the report via SAP for Me. 

Check SAP Note 3236443 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM for details to extract the required data from yoru SAP Solution manager.

I would like to highlight also the presentations and recordings of the last ALM Summit EMEA 2023, get all the material in this link
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-almsummit/sap-alm-summit-emea-2023-materials.html?sap-outbound-id=BB15CA9BEFBA63B6493D9B98CAE8008C3B83C5DE&smc_campaign_id=0000037414&source=email-smc

ChaRM functionality will be included in Implementation- Deployment scenario in SAP Cloud ALM.

Pay attention to session: What's in for You? Get the Latest Outlook for SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation

Hope this helps, 

Dolores Correa

SAP Support

entry.title: QA33 NO LAYOUTS FOUND
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When I try to run the QA33 program a custom layout comes automatically and I get an error message called no layouts found. 

I know there is no such a layout among my layouts, may it come from custom code, but I want to use a standard layout here all the time to charm away this problem. 

Do you have any idea about how can I delete the layout pointed out below from all users (And how can I be sure it will not come back)? 

Waiting for your kind responses.

entry.title: Which hybris-commerce-integrations version should we indicates when deploying version 2211.16?
entry.content:
Which hybris-commerce-integrations version should we indicates when deploying version 2211.16

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Which hybris-commerce-integrations version should we...
entry.content:
It should be 2211.14. Please see below help docs for detailed product version compatibility.

Product Compatibility Matrix

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/0263e32b0d2a4010afed87b8de145092/9f828ef94e1542a59c56cece0fa6e6ae.html

entry.title: Communication Scenario is Missing error in SAP Customer Checkout
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I select an Item in the SAP customer checkout it gives an error message called "Communication Scenario is Missing". What may be the course for this? Earlier I was able to do all the transactions and it has synched all the data with the SAP B1 system as well. 

SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to SAP Grants Management for Grantee
entry.content: A great work, Atif! Thanks you so much for such great sharing on grants management!

entry.title: Re: Batch derivation during GR
entry.content: Dear All, We found that the issue stems from a customer exit triggered during goods receipt, which updates data in the finished goods batch based on the goods issue.

entry.title: Re: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

TR i have created in Dev system, but while upgrade QAS system due to some communication gap SUM executed with out SPDD and SPAU TR, in SPDD phase we moved TR from DEV to QAS with help of command, So my question is for SPAU after upgrade we need to move TR to QAS  after upgrade, so do i need to execute any program?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Additional Functions for Multiple Counter Plans (Mast...
entry.content:
Hi Igor,

I dont see you need to activate any thing separately. When you activate in configuration, it will update the relevant tables, configurations etc.

In case of any issues, you can check SAP Notes, Correction or update will be available.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: how do you change the planning plant for a maintenanc...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is available under the configuration node. Go to SPRO and open below nodes

Enterprise Structure - Definition - Maintain Maintenance Planning Plant

Enterprise Structure - Assignment - Plant Maintenance - Assign Maintenance Planning Plant to Maintenance Plant

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP and SAP BW 7.52 Deveoper Edition
entry.content:
Yes, SAP Netweaver Developer Edition can indeed be used for setting up a BW (Business Warehouse) test system. SAP Netweaver Developer Edition provides a comprehensive environment for training and testing various SAP technologies, including ABAP and BW.

To set up a BW test system using SAP Netweaver Developer Edition, you would typically follow the installation instructions provided by SAP for the Developer Edition. Once installed, you can configure the system to include the BW components.

As for importing sample data for training purposes, SAP typically provides sample data sets that can be imported into BW systems for training and testing. These sample data sets often come with tutorials or guides on how to import and utilize them within the BW system.

Additionally, you can also create your own sample data sets or use publicly available data sets to populate your BW test system for training purposes.

Overall, yes, it is possible to use SAP Netweaver Developer Edition for setting up a BW test system and importing sample data for training.

entry.title: Re: BOBJ/BODS Created a new db/repository; load from anot...
entry.content:
Hi Rillic,

 

From the error provided, there is no entry for the database/SID into which the backup/dump is going to be loaded. So first get the database/SID created and check it's existence from master..sysdatabases and then proceed with your activity.

Regards,
Dilip Voora

If this does not behave properly, then raise a OSS message to SAP

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Import from Excel not showing the updates in Change Logs
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I recently updated 2 UDF's on Business Partner Master Data through Import From Excel. However, the updates did not show up in the Change Logs of the Business Partners. Instead it is showing that the data version changed. I only updated the 2 UDFs to the value zero (0). Please refer screenshot below-

Can you please help me to understand why its behaving this way. Thanks a lot in advance.

Regards,
Abhishek.

entry.title: Re: Some of the transactions are taking more time from DB...
entry.content: ST12 is not the only way to analyze performance. You have also the more simple ones SAT (supersedes SE30) and ST05. The main issue is to interpret the results of the trace.

entry.title: INVCON idoc triggering issue with particular Plant. So no Inventory Download in SAP DMC.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have integrated plant 0001 and plant 0003 with SAP DMC with Inventory management modes as Individual mode and Consolidate mode respectively. Whereas we can able to send the INVCON Idocs for 311 Movement type in MIGO goods movement for plant 0003 to SAP DMC and can see inventory download message also. Similarly we are trying to do goods movement in MIGO using 311 movement type in plant 0001 but the INVCON Idoc is not getting trigger. So why its happening for 0003 and why not for 0001 plant?

SAP Digital Manufacturing SAP Digital Manufacturing Insights @ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on "show replies" then "comment".

entry.title: Re: Additional Functions for Multiple Counter Plans (Mast...
entry.content:
Hi Terence,

Thank you very much for your reply. I'm aware that with the customizing, we already have all the functionalities included and we don't have to activate anything additionally. My question is more on what is technically enabled with this flag. It has to trigger new functions and fields and I would be very interested in that. Unfortunately, I was not able to find any additional information in detail at SAP and there is no SAP note on this information.

Thanks & Regards,

Igor

entry.title: sap product master data
entry.content:
hi team
 while adding distribution channel to material we are unable to get adding the channel.
after de bugging with ABAP they give this statement   -; "The product HBCE2B is attempting to update the amount of 1818.12 AUD against plant 6910 for this material. Upon comparison with the existing value of 1804.84, the system is triggering an error message: ‘Change of price is not allowed."
please refer attached document.

can anyone give the solution what i need to do for adding the distribution

entry.title: Re: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content: If you mean that someone ran SPAU on the programs and this TR contains all the programs upgraded, then I guess you can transport the TR after SUM, but I'm not expert of SUM, so I don't know if there are additional tasks to perform.

entry.title: Re: Some of the transactions are taking more time from DB...
entry.content: Hi Sandra, he said that some of the transactions are taking more time in the DB, in that case, some of the Z-transactions may not have the proper indexes, for that you have to enable the trace using the transaction code ST12. Regards

entry.title: Cancel job in SAP PO 7.5 is not considering 4 year old messages
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Good day.

Our PIPO system version is 7.5.

I try to schedule a cancel job to cancel 4-year-old messages. (There are huge messages are in holding state in 2020). When I scheduled this job, I entered Older Than (Hours) parameter values as 35040. (365 * 4 * 24). However, the job is not considering 4-year-old messages it seems. After successful job run, the job log says, "Number of "EOIO" messages to be cancelled: 0 (in 0 sequences). 2020 holding messages are not cancelled. 

Entered value for parameter Process Only Messages with Status as "TBDL, WAIT, HOLD, NDLV". 

Could you please clarify why the job is not cancelling 2020 messages?

Thank you. 

Regards,

Jegatheeswaran P.

entry.title: Re: RAP - static read only field problem?
entry.content:
I also faced similar issue. Initially created behavior definition projection without field which was highlighted in the error message which includes wears or currency code. Now I created service definition and service binding respectively.

At this point you will not get this error.

Now again I updated behavior definition projection by adding the wears or currency code field to read only section. Am not seeing that error and when I execute the app the field becomes read only.

entry.title: Re: HU information from S4 Outbound delivery not passed t...
entry.content:
Hi,

which information? When you use EWM, there is no packing in the LE delivery, you pack in EWM.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Questions Regarding SAP Companion for Desktop
entry.content:
Hi

1st question.

In any case you have to install additional soft. It depends on SEN edition cloud or onprem. Check installation guid there are quite a lot of information about delivery scenario and autostart DA.

2nd question

Try to change this parameter in settings. Screen attached.

3rd question

Did you neutralise page key?

4th question

It's quite interesting question I've heard something about this but I haven't checked

entry.title: Re: Maintain Assignment of Document Info Record to Maintenance Task Lists via API, OAuth and Postman
entry.content:
Hi Pascal !

thank you for your Blog as I found it very helpful.  I have managed to get this working on my system - (by the way we only have the basic 2 tier S4HC landscape with just QA and PROD).

I have a question around the operation of the OAuth Token.  It is fine for me personally to do this in POSTMAN with all of the popups.

but we will want to allow a 3rd Party application to call the APIs.  It would not be practical of course for the 3rd Party application to have popups in the middle of proceedings to ask for IAS credentials and whether to approve etc!. ...  so how can it be done in a seamless manner?   Perhaps this would be done in IAS but instead of setting up a ClientID/Secret in my S4HC applications Client Authentication it would be set to use a certificate provided by the third-party application for authentication and have it registered against my S4HC applications Client Authentication.

By the way your question about what Dennis L did in IAS - I think you meant is what IAS Client Authentication settings were made.  When I did it, I went into our SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) for the Application of our S4HC QAS system and in the Application APIs > Client Authentication , I added a Secret for the existing Client ID.

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh: Event Connector to Microsoft Azure to go Beta
entry.content:
Hi @KStrothmann - same question here. Since SAP now has "prohibited" customers from using the CDC connector with RFC modules (SAP note 3255746), it would be interesting to know whether the Event Mesh can be considered a viable alternative. If still in Beta since 2022, it raises concerns. Could you please comment?

Regards,

Trond Stroemme

entry.title: Re: Exception Code for MFS
entry.content: Thanks, Ramesh, for this explanation.

entry.title: Re: Create an xP&A Business Flow with SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere & SAP Cloud Integr
entry.content: Thank you very much Iver, I hope it will help to understand better the flexibility of SAP solutions for running xP&A processes.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access)
entry.content: @chris_bezuidenhout2, In a few days, I will also share a blog post about this subject. There is a different way to add the "vector" database extension. When I share, I will also share link in here for you.

entry.title: Re: Some of the transactions are taking more time from DB...
entry.content: As I said, ST12 = ST05 (SQL trace) + SAT (SE30). SAT also measures the SQL performance, but what you mean is that only the SQL trace (ST05 or ST12 as you like it a lot) shows the execution plan. But to interpret it, you must get experienced with database systems.

entry.title: How do I add subquery in SQ02?
entry.content:
Let's say I want to add a column in SQ02 with a sql statement where left join column A with MBEW where plant = XY. How do I do this?

Can you please give me example for code too?

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Possibilities: Extending Fiori Elements Apps with the Flexible Programming Model
entry.content: @TylerFinchamIt is completely about your screen width. I haven't done something different about this subject.

entry.title: Re: Effortless Material Creation using Excel Sheets via Fiori App (e.g., SolidWorks' CAD-Driven Data
entry.content: @gregorwI haven't tried standart OData Service that you suggest. I will check and maybe add a part to my blog about it. Thank you for your advise 🙂

entry.title: Re: Handling Cutoff Dates during BW transition to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello DKK,

I think it could be more useful if written with SQLScript rather than flat SQL code with nested queries => Use Variabiles.

Another thing that can be done with variables is adding some NO_INLINE hint in SQL statements, so it could optimize some steps (there are 3 layers of window functions, as we know they are not good for HANA.

Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA -...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. Or, is there a way to refresh the entire application browser?

entry.title: Re: Switch from text to key for measures in script
entry.content: Does no one have any ideas on how to solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: How do I add subquery in SQ02?
entry.content: SAPquery is very old, it has not changed for years even decade(s). You may indicate a column in the join condition but not a constant. The only solution for the infoset is to use ABAP code instead of the editor ("Data reading program" instead of "free join"). Of course, if it was an inner join, you could define a selection outside the join.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Manage System Hibernation
entry.content: Yes, that's true for free tier.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM - No Data available in Business Process Mon...
entry.content:
Hi Miriam,

Do other use cases (Health Monitoring, Integration & Exception Monitoring, etc.) collect data from the connected SAP S/4HANA Cloud System? If no then there may be an issue with how the communication arrangements are configured. If the issue only occurs for Business Process Monitoring then it may be an issue requiring some Developer input, which would require a Case to be created in SAP for Me.

Regards,
John

entry.title: Re: Import BPMN Models in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Michael, 

can customer edit process model in Cloud ALM directly? For example if they want to add additional task or event etc. Or the tool only allows to see without editing rights? @MichaelBuse

entry.title: Department to Department via Parent Hierarchy
entry.content: We have a Parent Child Department Hierarchy. In addition, Department is also associated with Legal Entity, Business Unit and Division objects via one-to-one relationship. If there is a change at the Department record, like changing the Business Unit of one Department, will it be possible to reflect this change in all of its child Departments such that the child departments also reflects the updated Business Unit. Please advise how it can be achieved If at all its possible.

entry.title: Re: Create an xP&A Business Flow with SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere & SAP Cloud Integr
entry.content:
Hi @TuncayKaraca,

Of-course, you can rely on the generic Datasphere SFTP connection to integrate data directly in a table.

But you will have to link each single SFTP file directly without any variabilization, that's why I have proposed to use Cloud Integration in between to manage a more dynamic behaviour (context taken from SAC story filters).

entry.title: Re: What you should know about controlling in SAP S/4HANA. (Part 2)
entry.content:
Thanks for your response @gianluca_taccone . 

We cannot use classic ECC functionality like integrated Profit center planning because its been discontinued on Hana. So we can only plan IO, CC & WBS and because we dont have SAC (or BPC) we cant plan PC / Balance sheet items. 

SAP's whole planning 'solution' seems lacking / incomplete to me... Hana doesn't have PC planning, BPC is terrible, SAC seems like the only solution, yet in its also in its infancy... So now we are looking at other planning solutions like Anaplan.

entry.title: Re: Not able to save in Content Server (Log Full issue)
entry.content: I have no knowledge in DMS or SAP systems in general, but I know from MaxDB that a Log Full issue usually happens if somehow the backup of MaxDB is not working. If you're using MaxDB then you may want to check it.

entry.title: Re: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content: in QAS, stms import the tr, that should be the same.

entry.title: Re: How to assign a role pragmatically to a user in SAP B...
entry.content:
To assign a role programmatically to a user in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) using SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP), you can follow these steps:

1. Define Roles: First, define the roles you want to assign to users in your SAP BTP account. Roles can be defined in the SAP BTP cockpit or SAP Identity Authentication service.

2. Create an Access Control Model (ACM): In your CAP project, define an Access Control Model where you specify the roles and permissions for your application. This can be done in the access folder of your CAP project.

3. Implement Authorization Logic: Implement the necessary logic to determine which roles should be assigned to users. This logic could be based on user attributes, such as user type, department, or any other relevant criteria.

4. Assign Roles: Use the SAP BTP APIs or SDKs within your CAP project to assign roles to users programmatically. You can leverage the User and Role Management APIs provided by SAP BTP for this purpose.

5. Testing and Validation: Test your implementation thoroughly to ensure that roles are being assigned correctly based on your authorization logic.

Here's a general example of how you might implement role assignment in CAP:

// Import necessary modules
const xsenv = require('@sap/xsenv');
const { User, Role } = require('@sap/hana-client');

// Get SAP BTP service credentials
const credentials = xsenv.getServices({ xsuaa: { tag: 'xsuaa' } }).xsuaa;

// Function to assign role to user
async function assignRoleToUser(userId, roleId) {
// Connect to SAP HANA to manage roles
const conn = xsenv.getHanaOptions().connection;

// Create user and role objects
const user = new User(conn);
const role = new Role(conn);

try {
// Begin transaction
conn.exec('BEGIN');

// Check if user exists
const userExists = await user.exists(userId);
if (!userExists) {
// Handle user not found
console.error(`User ${userId} not found.`);
return;
}

// Check if role exists
const roleExists = await role.exists(roleId);
if (!roleExists) {
// Handle role not found
console.error(`Role ${roleId} not found.`);
return;
}

// Assign role to user
await user.grantRole(userId, roleId);

// Commit transaction
conn.exec('COMMIT');

console.log(`Role ${roleId} assigned to user ${userId} successfully.`);
} catch (error) {
// Rollback transaction in case of error
conn.exec('ROLLBACK');
console.error('Error assigning role:', error);
} finally {
// Close connection
conn.close();
}
}

// Example usage
const userId = 'example_user';
const roleId = 'example_role';
assignRoleToUser(userId, roleId);

Please note that this is a simplified example and you may need to adapt it to fit your specific requirements and environment. Also, make sure to handle errors and edge cases appropriately in your production code.

entry.title: Re: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content: After scn site screen upgraded its difficult to me post Q&A, Sorry for that.

entry.title: Solution Manager system copy
entry.content:
Hi team,
We are planning to migrate our Solman 7.2 SP 16 to another Data center and want to check how can we move all the LMDB, SLD configuration and want to understand if there is any guide or the process for the Solman configurations. Please help.
DO we have any tasklist for this? What would be the best practise ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager system copy
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Can you elaborate on what you want to migrate on Solman? Is it a system copy or a database migration? 
If it is a database migration, normally the configuration will be kept if you just migrate the database and the data is stored to the new DB successfully.
However if DB SID or host name will be changed after migration, then the original configuration might be affected.

Regarding the SLD migration, please check if Note 2068999 is helpful
##2068999 - Migrating an SLD

If further help is required with database migration/system copy, you can contact BC-INS-MIG.

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: Is this issue solved?

entry.title: Material advance planning status marked 'Not relevant for planning' after upgrade 2022 version
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have upgraded our system to S4 HANA 2022 version, after upgrade while testing we observed in material advance planning tab indictor marked and status field newly added with description 'Not relevant for planning' but same upgrade we did in out test system there working fine. kindly help me if anybody faced same issues or any lead which will great help full.

Thanks.

entry.title: Audit Management SAP QM Public cloud
entry.content: What is the application for new vendor audit in SAP QM public cloud

entry.title: Cost component split when price control V
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

a bit unusual question probably, but I failed to discover an exact answer - I have a material managed as MAP (price control=V, price determination=2) which doesn't make it possible to record a standard cost estimate at the material level, even if the one is calculated (it remains as 'wo material reference' which is an expected system behavior). I'm thinking of switching the price determination to 3 instead of 2, with price control still V, just in order to switch the material ledger tables in, and have a chance to have a cost estimate assigned to a material and cost component split available for it. What do you think? What are possible cons to this solution, in terms of stock  valuation in particular?  

@all

Pretty much aware this is NOT a recommended way to manage materials, pls don't spend your time pointing this out. I need a reasonable feedback on this particular approach constraints.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Create/Update listing exclusion in ECC using PRICAT Inbound IDOC
entry.content:
Requirement is to get listing/exclusion maintained automatically in system, upon receiving PRICAT IDOC in SAP ECC system.

Kindly help if its achievable in standard and please share related Notes/Link/steps to do it.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation: List Management
entry.content:
Greetings,

The purpose of the post is to explain, seek advise and robust solutions to the below Anomaly experienced when populating a List Variable in SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation.

Use case:

We are currently automating a propose by reading data from a 3rd party solution using a REST API.

Figure 1: Process Automation

  1. We have a Custom script embedded with the API logic
  2. Call web service element for the service call 
  3. Write to Json file element: which holds the returned results from the webservice 
  4. Read json file element: to read a specific field being the username within the json file
  5. For Each element: within the for each loop we read a specific field being the username into a list variable and an add item(List) element.
    • Custom script: Which declares an empty list then populates the list with usernames from the previously collected data which resides in the Read json file element step 4

Figure 2:Custom Script Logic

  • Add item(List): Which adds the collected names  in above custom script to the element.

The Above process successfully executes and iterates through the file as expected, However:

  1.  The List variable, Overwrites the entries populated at each iteration instead of appending 
  2. Furthermore,   the List variable holds the last name then populates null values.

Results from various iterations, we have also attached the list results to the post:

 

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Upload Mass Data for Shared Service Framework Configuration
entry.content:
Hi All,

At the moment maintenance of the SSF MD elements such as routing rules, organizational structure, approval engine requires manual, click-based effort by business administrator. This is time consuming and ineffective both for initial implementation and further maintenance. We are searching for hints/good practices/automations (like upload/download features) that can be applied to limit this unnecessary effort.

We could imagine to have a solution like we have it for Smart Close. Upload/download functions are available in Smart Close. You can create a download (to excel file) from the certain feature/functionality/configuration of the Smart Close, adjust the data/ add rows etc. and upload this file back to the system. This works great when you need to do a setup of new Company Code, add users, change certain elements of the month end scenarios etc.

Do you have an idea if this would be possible to have such a solution or if there is already something existing what could be used?

 

Many Thanks!

Alexander

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist

entry.title: Re: Handling Cutoff Dates during BW transition to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for your time on reading this blog.

I tend to agree with you in principal, all solutions which work are acceptable. We can always compare the execution plan to see in which is the gain.

We have to remember that this temporary solution is focused for Dimensions ,  so even for big customers the DataSet cannot be more than couple of millions and Dimensions do not tend to change so dramatically. Ending, we can always materialize the Result Set either in memory or to a target table.

Thank you once more.

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: Thanks, there is an ETA to the issue fix?

entry.title: Managing Finite multiple Quantities in Materials\BOM (+ CK11N)
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

I'm seeking assistance with managing finite quantities in a Bill of Materials (BOM). I need a way to ensure specific components in the BOM remain as int numbers and are not recalculated when evaluating material usage, similar to the "round to multiple" function in Excel.

Example Scenario:

In my production process, I use 3 drill bits for every 1,000 holes. However, when I evaluate a batch of 1,500 holes using transaction CK11N, SAP calculates a requirement of 4.5 drill bits. Ideally, I'd like it to suggest 6 drill bits. 

Desired Behavior:

I need SAP to consider the drill bits in whole numbers, following a multiple of 3:

  • 3 drill bits for 1,000 holes
  • 6 drill bits for 1,500 holes
  • 9 drill bits for 3,000 holes
  • 12 drill bits for 3,100 holes 

Questions:

  1. Is there a way to configure SAP to handle finite quantities in the BOM with a specific multiple?
  2. Can I set a constraint on a specific material in the BOM to enforce int multiple numbers?
  3. While the MENGE field exists in the BOM, is there a way to utilize it to specify whole numbers for this scenario?

Additional Information to explain the problem:

Drill bit yields vary depending on the material:

  • Steel: 3,000 holes per drill bit
  • Brass: 4,000 holes per drill bit

Thank you for your time 

Best regards,

Luca

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA readiness check: check failure
entry.content:
Namespaces and enhancements in ATC - always fun! This is admittedly one of the most complicated parts of running ATC in a customer system, but let's see:

  1. SAP objects like RSNAST00 appear in your set of checked objects because they are modified or enhanced, and either the enhancement is in the object set, or you have activated that modified objects should be checked (on the "Modified Objects" tab when defining an ATC run series).
  2. When modified or enhanced SAP objects are checked, the ATC uses the so-called "check scope" to determine whether the resulting findings are related to the customer modification or enhancement or not. If not, the finding will not be shown in the result. This scope is essentially a list of namespaces that are owned by the customer, see also note 2215288 which delivers the tool with which you can register namespaces for this scope. By default, all producer namespaces with a valid development license are included in the scope.
  3. The ATC "protects" SAP-owned namespaces with an exclusion list, so that customers cannot register these by accident. Since we know that there are various inconsistencies that can lead to this protection being circumvented (and this has in the past led to confusion with customers who then suddenly got ATC findings for SAP code, which of course they cannot fix), there's an additional check where we refuse to check any object that lies in an SAP-owned namespace if an SAP-owned namespace is in scope, since this would then lead to inconsistent results. The SAP object does not have to lie in the problematic namespace for this to happen. That's the explanation for the "The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case." message you get. 
  4. So finally: For some reason, the ATC considers the namespace /0SJ1G/ to be in scope, but simultaneously the system considers this to be an SAP-owned namespace. The solution depends on what this namespace really is: If the namespace is actually an SAP-namespace, you/we need to figure out why it is considered in scope in this customer system (some special partner setup where they actually have a development license? Just inconsistent entries in TRNSPACE? something else?) If the namespace is not an SAP namespace, then it's probably inconsistent entries in the system.

As for the error in ADT: I don't know what "SQL error code 4" for your database is, but the dump should tell you a bit more - it might just be a (temporary) problem with your database instead of anything wrong with the ATC. In any case, this is completely unrelated to the namespace problem, the table mentioned in the error message is for the storage of customized ATC priorities.

entry.title: Re: How to delete an email address from contact in SAP Ma...
entry.content:
Hi Florian

 

You can also use the application jobs "Contacts: Flag Contact IDs for Deletion" and "Contacts: Delete Flagged Contact IDs". To check which origin ID you should select, you can go to "Inspect contact", here you find the respective origin of the E-mail address. In this way all interaction data remains at the contact. 

 

Regards,

Danny

entry.title: Re: sap product master data
entry.content:
Hi,

The price with Price Control V cannot be changed manually. So maybe you need to check if the price is also in your upload data.

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01-Withholding Tax not Calculated Automatical...
entry.content: Dear @sumesh_gupta, I've checked this point and everything corresponds to the SAP documentation and also to what you've just told me about the process. I've set custo points 104226 and 104227. I've checked the BP and everything's ok. When I create a supplier invoice, the VAT line is calculated automatically, but the HO WHT line goes up but remains at 0. It doesn't calculate automatically, so I have to enter the amount manually. Have you ever had this problem on S/4hana public cloud?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Test Automation API GET Request
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you reviewed the Test Automation API documentation in the SAP Help Portal? 
The Query Parameters section provides more information about each of the parameters required in a request, including the "calmTenantLabel" parameter. It doesn't provide any examples, but it should shed some light on using the API.

Please note that this API is used by SAP Cloud ALM to make calls to other applications that support this API. It allows you to perform actions and access resources managed by remote services implementing this API. The target host name and the corresponding security protocol depend on those remote services.

So the API does not work "standalone" with only your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
The API needs to call into another service (your Test Automation tool) and get data from there.
The Business Accelerator Hub Overview page and the Authorization section of the SAP Help Portal documentation clarifies this further. 

Regards,
John

entry.title: where to check administrative data - Account Group in BP - customer master - s4 hana 2023
entry.content: usually i get the account group of a customer from Extras - administrative data - Account Group or from KNA1 table. but now i want to change the account group. but couldn't able to view account group under extras any other guidelines for this.

entry.title: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database, use as vectorstore database for AI Embeddings
entry.content:
Introduction

In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, leveraging the power of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and machine learning has become essential for businesses seeking a competitive edge. SAP's Business Technology Platform (BTP) offers a robust ecosystem for deploying AI solutions, and one crucial component of this ecosystem is the PostgreSQL Database. This guide will walk you through the process of utilizing a SAP BTP-hosted PostgreSQL Database as a vectorstore database for AI embeddings. By following the steps outlined below, you can harness the capabilities of AI embeddings to enhance your data analytics and decision-making processes.

Pre-requisites:

  • BTP Account (can be trial)
  • BTP PostgreSQL Database which can be assesible by SSH Tunnel
  • Cloud Foundry CLI

Step 1 - Obtain necessary information from BTP Cockpit and CF CLI

Before you can configure your PostgreSQL database, gather essential information from both the BTP Cockpit and the CF CLI. This information includes authorization tokens, Cloud Foundry region details, instance IDs, and database names. These details will be crucial for the subsequent steps.

Step 1.1 - Obtain Authorization token from CF CLI

 

cf oauth-token

 

Step 1.2 - Obtain CloudFoundryRegion from BTP Cockpit

Step 1.3 - Obtain PostgreSQL InstanceID from BTP Cockpit

Step 1.4 - Obtain Database name from BTP Cockpit

Step 2- Activate vector extension for PostgreSQL database hosted on BTP

With the prerequisite information in hand, it's time to activate the vector extension for your PostgreSQL database hosted on SAP BTP. This extension will enable your database to efficiently store and manage AI embeddings. You can activate it using various methods, such as CURL commands or Postman requests, as outlined in the guide. This step is pivotal in preparing your database for AI-related tasks.

To activate vector extension, PostgreSQL version should at least be 13.

 

https://api-backing-services.<CloudFoundryRegion>.data.services.cloud.sap/v1/postgresql-db/instances/<InstanceID>/extensions/vector

 

Activate with CURL

 

curl -X PUT 'https://api-backing-services.<CloudFoundryRegion>.data.services.cloud.sap/v1/postgresql-db/instances/<InstanceID>/extensions/vector' \
--header 'Authorization: <AuthorizationToken>' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{"database": "<DatabaseName>"}'

 

Activate with Postman

Step 3 - Check 'Vector' extension activation on pgAdmin

To connect to your PostgreSQL database, you'll need to establish an SSH tunnel. Follow the instructions outlined in the blog post provided below to open the tunnel.
SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access) 

Now that your PostgreSQL database is configured as a vectorstore for AI embeddings, you can put it to the test. Additionally with above blog, you learnt how to connect to your PostgreSQL database through an SSH tunnel and interact with the vectorized data.

Conclusion

In conclusion, this guide has equipped you with the knowledge and steps required to harness the power of SAP BTP and PostgreSQL as a vectorstore database for AI embeddings. By following these instructions, you can elevate your data analytics, information retrieval, and decision-making capabilities to new heights. AI embeddings offer a transformative approach to handling unstructured data, enabling you to extract valuable insights and drive innovation within your organization. As technology continues to advance, embracing AI and leveraging robust platforms like SAP BTP becomes imperative for staying competitive in the modern business landscape.

entry.title: Unable to cancel Sales order with delivery status of the item is 'In-process' or 'Finished'
entry.content:
We found that we cannot cancel sales order by select reason for rejection when the  delivery status of the item is 'In-process' or 'Finished'. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to cancel Sales order with delivery status of...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Once delivery status of the item is 'In-process' or 'Finished', cancellation of the item is not possible in the Sales Order screen

You can refer to the below KBAs. 

KBA 1755905 - You are not able to Cancel a Sales Order

KBA 2644606 - How to maintain the Reason for Rejection in Project Based Sales Order Item

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support
